understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously to complete the current level, and then progress through all levels to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel steps in cardinal directions. Some objects can be pushed when adjacent in the movement direction, while walls block movement. Multiple selectable pieces can exist; using the CLICK action with a pixel-coordinate target_position switches control to another selectable piece at that position. The movement_blocked hints are heuristic and not fully reliable—direct interaction reveals true blocking behavior.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously to complete the current level, and then progress through all levels to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel steps in cardinal directions. Some objects can be pushed when adjacent in the movement direction, while walls block movement. Multiple selectable pieces can exist; using the CLICK action with a pixel-coordinate target_position switches control to another selectable piece at that position. The movement_blocked hints are heuristic and not fully reliable—direct interaction reveals true blocking behavior.
